name: All-American Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and shortening until fluffy.
2. Add eggs and beat again.
3. Slowly begin adding the dry ingredients, mixing gently after each addition.
4. Add milk and vanilla, continuing to mix gently.
5. Mix in the blueberries gently.
6. Pour batter into pre-sprayed muffin tins.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 - 30 minutes until golden brown.
